ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Adventure, Animation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_genres" (
  "user_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-genre pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the genre */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user for the genre (on a scale of -3 to 3) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_genres_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_preferences" (
  "genre_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-genre pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the preference */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre being preferred or disliked */,
  "preference" REAL /* Preference value (on a scale of -1 to 1) indicating the user's interest in the genre */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was set */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the movie belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings" (
  "movie_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-movie pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user for the movie (on a scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-movie pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being recommended */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was generated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Brief reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborative_filtering" (
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-movie pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user for the movie (on a scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborative_filtering_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborative_filtering_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_based_filtering" (
  "cbf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre pair */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the movie belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the movie-genre relationship (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was calculated */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_based_filtering_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_based_filtering_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hybrid_recommendations" (
  "hybrid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-movie pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being recommended */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was generated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Brief reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hybrid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hybrid_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hybrid_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie related to the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., watch, rate, search) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity (e.g., watch time) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
